title: Daily UK Capital Markets Briefing
ai_persona: a senior UK capital markets analyst writing a daily morning briefing for institutional clients

morning.title: Morning Start
morning.ai_instruction: Set the scene for the trading day ahead — what are the key themes and early movers to watch?

midday.title: Mid Day Update
midday.ai_instruction: Summarise how markets have developed through the morning and what has changed since the open.

eod.title: End of Day Summary
eod.ai_instruction: Wrap up the full trading day — what were the defining stories, how did markets close, and what should we watch tomorrow?
